summary: SMS domain analysis complete. Domain is READY for green-ai rebuild specification.

canonical_entities.role: Root aggregate. Multi-channel broadcast campaign. Contains scheduling, lookup config, and channel payloads.
Recipient definition per Broadcast. Holds address, phone, StandardReceiver ref, and merge fields.
SMS channel payload for Broadcast. 1:1 with Broadcast. PK = BroadcastId (no identity).
Single delivery attempt per recipient per channel. Created at dispatch. Status updated via priority-merge rule.
Immutable DLR event from gateway/channel. Written by ALL channels (SMS, Email, Voice, Eboks). Shared subsystem.
Records recipients that could not be resolved to a phone number during lookup.
canonical_entities.warning: CONFLICTING in Layer 0: type mismatch on SmsGroupId (int vs long). Must use long in green-ai.

canonical_entities.role: File attachment reference for Broadcast. Not registered in DapperPlus — loaded via repository directly.

critical_invariants.name: EventuallyConsistent_StatusModel
critical_invariants.rule: System is EVENTUALLY CONSISTENT. Multiple writers, async callbacks, batch and background services write DeliveryRecord.StatusCode. Design must accommodate this.

critical_invariants.name: StatusPriority_MergeRule
critical_invariants.rule: When multiple DeliveryStatusEvents exist for the same DeliveryRecord: IsFinal(3) > IsBillable(2) > default(1), ThenBy DateReceivedUtc ascending, Last() wins. Simple last-write-wins is FORBIDDEN.

critical_invariants.name: Broadcast_Activation_Idempotent
critical_invariants.rule: Activating a Broadcast that is already Active must be a no-op (return immediately). Not a DB constraint — must be enforced in domain logic.

critical_invariants.name: MarkSent_Idempotent
critical_invariants.rule: DateSentUtc is set only once (if null). Method returns true on first set, false on repeat call.

critical_invariants.name: NoRecipients_Guard
critical_invariants.rule: Broadcast with no recipients (SmsGroupItems empty AND GeoObjects empty AND HasRecipients=false) must throw before activation proceeds.

critical_invariants.name: SmsCount_UCS2_GSM7
critical_invariants.rule: SMS part count is a first-class rule. UCS2: ≤70→1, else ceil(len/63). GSM7: ≤160→1, else ceil(len/153). Not cosmetic — affects pricing and delivery.

critical_invariants.name: GatewayRouting_Priority
critical_invariants.rule: Routing priority: TestMode → GatewayApi(TreNRG) → GatewayApi(highPriority) → Strex(country) → GatewayApi(default). This is a policy, not just implementation.
critical_invariants.warning: TreNRG is hardcoded string in Layer 0. Green-ai must NOT copy this. Extract to config.

critical_invariants.name: DeliveryStatusEvent_SharedSubsystem
critical_invariants.rule: DeliveryStatusEvents are written by all 4 channels. Must be modelled centrally with channel discriminator.

critical_invariants.name: LookupGate_WebVsBatch
critical_invariants.rule: Lookup dispatch: web-server (sync) only if no DateDelayToUtc AND (ByAddress+FromApi+≤5 items OR ByStdReceivers). Any DateDelayToUtc = batch always.

critical_invariants.name: LastMinuteLookup_SchedulingBypass
critical_invariants.rule: LastMinuteLookup+scheduled groups do NOT dispatch lookup at activation. Lookup must be triggered near DateDelayToUtc by scheduler.

known_bugs_do_not_inherit.layer0_bug: GatewayApiCallbackAsync: int.TryParse on DeliveryRecord.Id (which is long). Silent failure for IDs > 2,147,483,647.
known_bugs_do_not_inherit.green_ai_rule: All DeliveryRecord IDs must be long or strongly-typed ID. int.TryParse is FORBIDDEN.

known_bugs_do_not_inherit.layer0_bug: SmsLogsNoPhoneAddress: SmsGroupId type mismatch (int vs long) between write path and RejectedSmsLog read path.
known_bugs_do_not_inherit.green_ai_rule: UnresolvedRecipient.BroadcastId must be long. No int overloads.

known_bugs_do_not_inherit.layer0_bug: TreNRG routing is hardcoded string. No config, no toggle — architectural smell embedded in routing logic.
known_bugs_do_not_inherit.green_ai_rule: GatewayRouting must be config-driven. Hardcoded gateway name strings are FORBIDDEN.

acceptable_unknowns.unknown: Azure Batch job internals (BatchServices/ and BalarmWebApp/ not in Layer 0)
acceptable_unknowns.rationale: Unknown lies in execution infrastructure, not domain logic. Domain rules are complete enough for rebuild.
acceptable_unknowns.rebuild_note: Green-ai may use IHostedService, Hangfire, or background service pattern. Not bound to Azure Batch.

open_decisions_for_rebuild_phase.topic: Deactivate behavior: soft-delete vs hard-delete vs archive
